## Runtime.RuntimeContext.create() method

Creates a RuntimeContext with a new or default ChocolateLibrary. This is the primary factory method for most use cases.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static create(params?: IRuntimeContextCreateParams): Result<RuntimeContext>;
```
